examples.en: I am writing regarding the invoice you sent last week.
examples.zh: 我來信是關於您上週寄來的發票。

examples.en: Please see the attached notes regarding our next meeting.
examples.zh: 關於我們下次的會議,請參閱附件筆記。

img: hand pointing at email subject line

examples.en: Please find the enclosed report for your reference.
examples.zh: 隨函附上報告供您參考。

examples.en: The enclosed documents contain all the details you requested.
examples.zh: 附上的文件包含您要求的所有細節。

img: letter with document tucked inside envelope

examples.en: You can find the schedule in the attachment below.
examples.zh: 您可以在下方附件中找到時程表。

examples.en: Sorry, I forgot to include the attachment in my last email.
examples.zh: 抱歉,我上一封信忘了加上附件。

examples.en: Yours sincerely, followed by his full name and title.
examples.zh: 敬上,後面接著他的全名與職稱。

examples.en: We sincerely appreciate your continued support.
examples.zh: 我們誠摯感謝您一直以來的支持。

img: handwritten signature at bottom of letter

examples.en: Please acknowledge receipt of this email when you can.
examples.zh: 方便時請回覆確認已收到此信。

examples.en: We acknowledge that the delivery arrived one day late.
examples.zh: 我們確認貨物延遲了一天送達。

examples.en: Thank you for your inquiry about our new product line.
examples.zh: 感謝您對我們新產品線的詢問。

examples.en: We will respond to your inquiry within two business days.
examples.zh: 我們將於兩個工作天內回覆您的詢問。

examples.en: I would like to confirm our appointment for Friday morning.
examples.zh: 我想確認我們週五早上的約會。

examples.en: Could you please confirm whether the price includes shipping?
examples.zh: 能否請您確認價格是否包含運費?

examples.en: We apologize for the delay in responding to your message.
examples.zh: 我們為延遲回覆您的訊息致歉。

examples.en: I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
examples.zh: 對於可能造成的任何不便,我誠摯致歉。

examples.en: I would appreciate it if you could reply by Monday.
examples.zh: 若您能在週一前回覆,我將十分感激。

examples.en: We greatly appreciate your patience during this process.
examples.zh: 我們非常感謝您在此過程中的耐心。

examples.en: Kindly let me know if you need any further information.
examples.zh: 如需任何進一步資訊,煩請告知。

examples.en: Please kindly send the signed contract back to us.
examples.zh: 煩請將簽好的合約寄回給我們。

img: polite request note with soft handwriting

examples.en: Make sure the recipient's email address is spelled correctly.
examples.zh: 務必確認收件人的電子郵件地址拼寫正確。

examples.en: The recipient did not reply to the previous message.
examples.zh: 收件人並未回覆先前的訊息。

examples.en: Please keep all correspondence related to this order.
examples.zh: 請保留與此訂單相關的所有書信。

examples.en: Our correspondence with the supplier lasted several weeks.
examples.zh: 我們與供應商的通信持續了數週。

examples.en: I will forward your message to the relevant department.
examples.zh: 我會將您的訊息轉寄給相關部門。

examples.en: Could you forward me the original email, please?
examples.zh: 能否請您把原始郵件轉寄給我?

img: email arrow pointing to another inbox

examples.en: I have attached the updated price list to this email.
examples.zh: 我已將更新的價目表附在此封郵件中。

examples.en: Please attach a copy of your ID when you reply.
examples.zh: 回覆時請附上一份您的身分證明副本。

examples.en: We will notify you as soon as the order ships.
examples.zh: 訂單一出貨我們就會通知您。

examples.en: Please notify us in advance if you cannot attend.
examples.zh: 若您無法出席,請事先通知我們。

examples.en: We have received your request and are looking into it.
examples.zh: 我們已收到您的請求,正在處理中。

examples.en: Please submit your request through the online form.
examples.zh: 請透過線上表單提交您的請求。

examples.en: Please quote this reference number in all future emails.
examples.zh: 請在日後所有郵件中註明此參考編號。

examples.en: I am attaching last year's report for your reference.
examples.zh: 我附上去年的報告供您參考。

examples.en: I will respond to your questions by the end of the day.
examples.zh: 我會在今天結束前回覆您的問題。

examples.en: Thank you for taking the time to respond so quickly.
examples.zh: 感謝您撥空這麼快回覆。

examples.en: Could you clarify what you meant in the second paragraph?
examples.zh: 能否請您說明第二段的意思?

examples.en: Let me clarify the terms before we sign the agreement.
examples.zh: 在簽署協議前,讓我把條款說明清楚。

examples.en: We have read your proposal attentively and have some notes.
examples.zh: 我們已仔細閱讀您的提案,並有一些意見。

examples.en: Thank you for attending to this matter so attentively.
examples.zh: 感謝您如此用心地處理此事。

examples.en: Thank you for your prompt reply to my inquiry.
examples.zh: 感謝您對我詢問的迅速回覆。

examples.en: We appreciate your prompt attention to this issue.
examples.zh: 我們感謝您對此問題的即時處理。

img: fast clock next to sent email

examples.en: Please feel free to send any queries to my assistant.
examples.zh: 如有任何疑問,歡迎寄給我的助理。

examples.en: All your queries have been forwarded to the support team.
examples.zh: 您所有的問題都已轉給支援團隊。

img: list of question marks on paper

examples.en: I will revert to you once I have the figures.
examples.zh: 等我拿到數據後就會回覆您。

examples.en: Kindly revert with your decision by Friday.
examples.zh: 煩請於週五前回覆您的決定。

examples.en: Warm greetings from all of us at the head office.
examples.zh: 總公司全體同仁向您致上溫暖的問候。

examples.en: Season's greetings and best wishes for the new year.
examples.zh: 佳節問候,並祝新年萬事如意。

examples.en: Best regards, and I look forward to hearing from you.
examples.zh: 順頌時祺,期待您的回音。

examples.en: Please give my regards to your manager.
examples.zh: 請代我向您的經理問好。

examples.en: Please double-check the recipient list before you send it.
examples.zh: 寄出前請再次核對收件人清單。

examples.en: Her name was accidentally left off the recipient list.
examples.zh: 她的名字不小心被漏在收件人清單之外。

examples.en: I am writing to follow up on my previous email.
examples.zh: 我來信是想跟進我先前的郵件。

examples.en: Let's follow up next week to check the progress.
examples.zh: 我們下週再跟進以確認進度。

examples.en: I am writing on behalf of our marketing director.
examples.zh: 我謹代表我們的行銷總監來信。

examples.en: On behalf of the whole team, thank you very much.
examples.zh: 謹代表整個團隊,非常感謝您。

examples.en: Please reply at your earliest convenience.
examples.zh: 請您儘早回覆。

examples.en: Kindly send the documents at your earliest convenience.
examples.zh: 煩請您儘早寄出文件。

examples.en: I look forward to your reply and further discussion.
examples.zh: 我期待您的回覆與進一步討論。

examples.en: We look forward to working with your company.
examples.zh: 我們期待與貴公司合作。

examples.en: To whom it may concern, I am applying for the position.
examples.zh: 敬啟者,本人欲申請該職位。

examples.en: The letter began with To whom it may concern.
examples.zh: 這封信以「敬啟者」開頭。

examples.en: As per your request, I have attached the full report.
examples.zh: 依據您的要求,我已附上完整報告。

examples.en: The goods were shipped as per our agreement.
examples.zh: 貨物已按照我們的協議出貨。

examples.en: Further to our phone call, here are the details in writing.
examples.zh: 承接我們的電話,以下是書面細節。

examples.en: Further to my last email, the meeting is now confirmed.
examples.zh: 關於我上封郵件,會議現已確認。

examples.en: Please be advised that our office will be closed on Monday.
examples.zh: 謹此告知,本辦公室週一將休息。

examples.en: Please be advised that prices will change next month.
examples.zh: 敬請注意,價格將於下月調整。

examples.en: Should you have any questions, please contact me directly.
examples.zh: 若您有任何疑問,請直接與我聯繫。

examples.en: Should you have any questions, our team is happy to help.
examples.zh: 若您有任何疑問,我們團隊樂意協助。

examples.en: I am sending the brochure for your reference.
examples.zh: 我寄上這份手冊供您參考。

examples.en: The chart below is for your reference only.
examples.zh: 下方圖表僅供您參考。

examples.en: We are in receipt of your payment. Thank you.
examples.zh: 我們已收到您的款項,謝謝。

examples.en: I am in receipt of your letter dated May 3rd.
examples.zh: 我已收到您五月三日的來信。

examples.en: We are unable to accept new orders at this time.
examples.zh: 我們目前無法接受新訂單。

examples.en: No further action is needed at this time.
examples.zh: 目前無需採取進一步行動。

meaning: 隨時供您差遣;供您使用

examples.en: Our support team is at your disposal around the clock.
examples.zh: 我們的支援團隊全天候供您差遣。

examples.en: I am at your disposal should you need assistance.
examples.zh: 如您需要協助,我隨時為您效勞。

img: assistant ready to help at desk

examples.en: Your feedback has been duly noted and will be reviewed.
examples.zh: 您的意見已充分知悉,並將被審視。

examples.en: Duly noted; I will make the changes right away.
examples.zh: 已記下,我會立刻進行修改。

examples.en: We regret to inform you that your application was unsuccessful.
examples.zh: 我們很遺憾地通知您,您的申請未通過。

examples.en: We regret to inform you of a delay in your shipment.
examples.zh: 我們很遺憾地通知您,您的貨運有所延誤。

img: formal rejection letter with sad tone

examples.en: As requested, please find the signed form attached.
examples.zh: 如所要求,請查收附上的簽署表單。

examples.en: I have sent the samples as requested.
examples.zh: 我已依照要求寄出樣品。

examples.en: With reference to your email, we have updated the order.
examples.zh: 關於您的郵件,我們已更新訂單。

examples.en: With reference to the contract, clause five needs revision.
examples.zh: 針對這份合約,第五條需要修改。

examples.en: Thank you in advance for your help with this matter.
examples.zh: 先行感謝您對此事的協助。

examples.en: Thank you in advance for your prompt reply.
examples.zh: 預先感謝您的迅速回覆。

examples.en: Please find attached the minutes from today's meeting.
examples.zh: 請查收附上的今日會議紀錄。

examples.en: Please find attached my updated résumé for your review.
examples.zh: 請查收附上的更新履歷供您審閱。

meaning: 我們為造成的不便致歉

examples.en: We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the system outage.
examples.zh: 系統中斷造成的不便,我們深感抱歉。

examples.en: We apologize for any inconvenience during the renovation.
examples.zh: 整修期間造成的不便,我們致上歉意。

word: please do not hesitate to contact

examples.en: Please do not hesitate to contact me if you need help.
examples.zh: 如需協助,請儘管與我聯繫。

examples.en: Please do not hesitate to contact our office anytime.
examples.zh: 任何時候都歡迎與我們辦公室聯繫。

img: open phone line with friendly agent

examples.en: I will be awaiting your reply before proceeding.
examples.zh: 在進行下一步前,我將靜候您的回覆。

examples.en: Awaiting your reply, I remain sincerely yours.
examples.zh: 靜候您的回音,謹此致意。

examples.en: As mentioned earlier, the deadline is next Wednesday.
examples.zh: 如先前所提,截止日是下週三。

examples.en: As mentioned earlier, we will cover the shipping cost.
examples.zh: 如先前所提,我們會負擔運費。

examples.en: Please advise whether the proposed date works for you.
examples.zh: 請告知所提議的日期是否適合您。

examples.en: Please advise on how you would like to proceed.
examples.zh: 請告知您希望如何進行。
